title: Robertsganj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Robertsganj, with a Z-Score of +5.94. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Robertsganj is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 19.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 30%, while the wind speed is moderate at 9.8 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact immediately.
